description_long: This object consists of two wooden chairs placed side by side, each featuring a simple, rectangular frame with straight legs and horizontal slats forming the backrests. The left chair has a reddish-brown wood finish and a plain gray upholstered seat, while the right chair has a lighter, natural wood tone with a checkered red and black fabric seat. Both chairs have flat, square seats and lack armrests, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. The seat cushions appear moderately padded, providing some comfort for sitting. The construction is sturdy, with visible wood grain and a matte finish, suitable for casual or communal urban settings. These chairs are typical of those found in cafes, waiting areas, or public gathering spaces.
description: A pair of simple wooden chairs, one with a gray seat and the other with a red checkered seat, both featuring slatted backrests and no armrests.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the horizontal slatted backrests and the contrasting seat fabrics of both chairs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat cushions and the straight, vertical legs.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the seat patterns and the open, armless design of both chairs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the seat depth and the wood grain texture on the frames.
